log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist HP: 35/59
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Hobgoblin — Armored Escapist HP: 12/59

→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!

══ ROUND 2 ══
